case_title: BENGU EFE VS. UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-09-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS TODAY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH RIZO--SECURITY REPRESENTATIVE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85.00. SERVED OCT-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY THOMAS NICHOLS--SECURITY SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EFE, BENGU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO. $276.02 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $436.02, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST JUDGMENT FOR $276.02, AN ACCOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,017.00 FILED BY EFE, BENGU AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
